chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Acquittal Appeal No. 424 of 2021 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of Main Case. 15.08.2023 Mr. Talib Ali Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. -x-x-x-x-x- None present except Addl. P.G, Sindh. Perusal of file reveals that instant appeal against acquittal was filed on 25.08.2021 and was fixed before the Court on 11.03.2022 when notice was issued to P.G, Sindh. Again on 03.08.2023, neither the appellant nor his counsel has taken pain to get it fixed before the Court by filing any application. Such lethargic attitude on the part of appellant as well as his counsel shows the appellant has lost his interest in the proceedings, therefore, he and his counsel have chosen to remain absent instead of pursuing it vigilantly. Consequently, instant Appeal against Acquittal is hereby dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
